ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region is in */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "device_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device usage record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "all_devices_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of all devices used */,
  "all_devices_count" INTEGER /* Total count of all devices used */,
  "desktop_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of desktop devices used */,
  "mobile_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of mobile devices used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage_by_type" (
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device usage by type record */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the overall device usage record */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device type */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the device type used */,
  "device_count" INTEGER /* Count of the device type used */,
  "average_session_time" TEXT /* Average session time for the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_by_type_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES device_usage ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_by_type_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., month, quarter, year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage_by_period" (
  "usage_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device usage by period record */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the overall device usage record */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period */,
  "all_devices_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of all devices used during the period */,
  "all_devices_count" INTEGER /* Total count of all devices used during the period */,
  "desktop_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of desktop devices used during the period */,
  "mobile_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of mobile devices used during the period */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of device usage during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_by_period_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES device_usage ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_by_period_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device usage record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES device_usage ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_data_sources" (
  "usage_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage-data source link */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device usage record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the data source in the overall statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_sources_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES device_usage ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
